calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Vacated

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff

Jeff Rosen, Esq. appearing for Defendant

Case assigned to Department 504A Judge Pro Tem Junji Suzuki for settlement conference.
Case settles on the record as follows:

Defendant will move into 3D for $1,000 monthly rent, new tenancy, including outside parting spot.
Defendant will vacate 3E and garage area on or before Nov. 1, 2003.
Plaintiff to pay trust account of Mr. Rosen $5,000 by October 10, 2003, will not be released until Nov.1, 2003.
Agree to: no sublease clause--no subleasing period, of any kind, and no subdividing of unit.
No repairs without permission.
No valet parking.
Full release and waiver pursuant to 1542.
Mr. Rossoff will prepare written settlement agreement and send to Mr. Rosen for signature.
